query:
SELECT TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME 
FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS 
WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() 
  AND TABLE_NAME IN ('apex_picks_sets', 'users', 'leaderboard_entries', 'onboarding_progress', 'user_ratings', 'ctci_progress', 'feedback', 'user_scores', 'site_settings')
  AND COLUMN_NAME = 'updatedAt'
ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user LS6oXFmEKtYAwQA.root --database cRTBYDQNffnDPa87zbUz9b --execute 
SELECT TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME 
FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS 
WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() 
  AND TABLE_NAME IN ('apex_picks_sets', 'users', 'leaderboard_entries', 'onboarding_progress', 'user_ratings', 'ctci_progress', 'feedback', 'user_scores', 'site_settings')
  AND COLUMN_NAME = 'updatedAt'
ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;
